creator: jm.public@gmail.com
text:
Port www/horde has been moved to www/horde-base.

cd /usr/ports && make index

fails in deskutils/kronolith with error message
kronolith-2.1.4: "/usr/ports/www/horde" non-existent -- dependency list incomplete
===> deskutils/kronolith failed
*** Error code 1
1 error

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports && make index

or
 
cd /usr/ports/deskutils/kronolith && make describe
